name: Nicolás Maduro
role: President of Venezuela (2013–present); successor to Hugo Chávez
quote: Chávez lives, the struggle goes on. The revolution will triumph against all imperialist aggression.

name: Hugo Chávez
role: President of Venezuela (1999–2013); founder of the Bolivarian Revolution; died March 5, 2013
quote: I am not a candidate. I am the people — and the people will never surrender.

name: María Corina Machado
role: Opposition leader; won 2023 primary with 90%; banned from running by Maduro government
quote: The Venezuelans have already voted. The truth cannot be hidden. Edmundo González is the president-elect of Venezuela.

name: Edmundo González Urrutia
role: 2024 opposition presidential candidate; recognized by US, EU, Argentina, Perú and others as elected president; exiled in Spain
quote: The Venezuelan people gave us their verdict on July 28. No fraud can undo 8 million votes.

name: Juan Guaidó
role: Former National Assembly president; declared interim president Jan 23, 2019; recognition withdrawn Jan 2023; exiled in Miami
quote: Under Article 233, before God, before my country, I formally assume the powers of the national executive.

name: Diosdado Cabello
role: PSUV co-founder; former ANC president; key Maduro regime pillar; indicted by US DOJ on drug trafficking charges (2020)
quote: Every coup against Venezuela will be defeated. The people and the armed forces are united.

name: Delcy Rodríguez
role: Executive Vice-President of Venezuela; former Foreign Minister; Maduro's closest political ally
quote: Venezuela rejects the interference of imperialist powers in our sovereign electoral processes.

name: Jorge Rodríguez
role: President of Venezuela's National Assembly (since 2021); Maduro's chief government negotiator
quote: We have the voting tallies. Nicolás Maduro won the election and we challenge the opposition to present their supposed actas.

name: Leopoldo López
role: Voluntad Popular founder; sentenced to 13.9 years in 2015; house arrest; fled to Spanish Embassy 2019; in exile in Madrid
quote: I deliver myself to the regime that persecutes me. But I do not surrender the fight for Venezuela's freedom.

name: Henrique Capriles Radonski
role: Former Miranda Governor; 2012 and 2013 presidential candidate vs Chávez and Maduro; lost to Maduro by 1.5%; politically sidelined
quote: I demand a total, complete, and transparent audit of the votes — not one, not two, but all votes.

name: Vladimir Padrino López
role: Minister of Defense; commander of Venezuelan Armed Forces (FANB); key guarantor of military loyalty to Maduro
quote: The Bolivarian National Armed Forces are loyal to the legitimate constitutional government of Venezuela.

name: Tarek El Aissami
role: Former Oil Minister and PDVSA president; arrested March 2023 on corruption charges; US-sanctioned on drug trafficking since 2017
quote: No statement available — arrested March 2023 and held incommunicado by Venezuelan authorities.

name: Simón Bolívar
role: El Libertador; independence leader; first president of Gran Colombia (1819–1830); revolutionary icon invoked by all political factions
quote: The art of winning is learned in defeat — and even in defeat, one does not abandon the ideal of freedom.

name: Alex Saab
role: Colombian businessman; Maduro envoy; extradited to US 2021; pleaded guilty to money laundering 2023; freed in prisoner swap Dec 2023
quote: I was arrested for serving Venezuela in a humanitarian mission. This was a political kidnapping.

name: Antonio Ledezma
role: Former Mayor of Caracas; arrested 2015 on coup conspiracy charges; escaped house arrest 2017; exiled in Madrid
quote: Maduro's regime holds Venezuela's soul hostage. We will not rest until every political prisoner is free.

name: Rómulo Betancourt
role: Founder of Acción Democrática (AD); first elected president under Punto Fijo democracy (1959–1964); established democratic transition model
quote: Democratic governments must distinguish themselves from dictatorships in the quality of their freedoms.
